documentation.readme: Radare2: Libre Reversing Framework for Unix Geeks
usage_sections: Description: r2 is a complete rewrite of radare. It provides a set of libraries, tools and plugins to ease reverse engineering tasks. Distributed under LGPLv3, despite each plugin can have different licenses (see r2 -Lj for details) The radare project started as a simple command-line hexadeci

Installation: Download the last released binaries. The recommended way to install radare2 is from Git repository source: Run sys/install.sh for the default acr+make+symlink installation meson/ninja (muon/samu also works) and make builds are supported.

Usage: These are the first steps to use r2, read the book or find tutorials for more details Many plugins are included in r2 by default. But you can extend its capabilities by using the r2pm package manager.

arguments.name: --target
arguments.description: Target host, IP, MAC, or URL the tool operates on.

arguments.name: --output
arguments.description: Output file path for the report or capture.

arguments.name: --version
arguments.description: Print the tool version and exit.

arguments.name: --wordlist
arguments.description: Path to a wordlist (users, passwords, paths).

arguments.name: --dry-run
arguments.description: Print what would be done without making any changes.

arguments.name: --force
arguments.description: Force the action even if a safety check would block it.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web, ad] in the frameworks category. Fits when the engagement needs: Radare2: Libre Reversing Framework for Unix Geeks.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: Radare2: Libre Reversing Framework for Unix Geeks.
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: git clone https://github.com/radareorg/radare2. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `radare2/sys/install.sh`. Further invocations from upstream: `Many plugins are included in r2 by default. But you can extend its capabilities`; `by using the [r2pm]($KFIOSA_TARGET_URL package manager.`. Radare2: Libre Reversing Framework for Unix Geeks.
